question_zh: 如圖所示，求 A(2,-3) 和 B(4,-3) 的距離
question_en: Find the distance between A(2,-3) and B(4,-3)
image_svg:
<svg width="300" height="300" viewBox="0 0 300 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<line x1="30" y1="150" x2="270" y2="150" stroke="#333" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<line x1="150" y1="30" x2="150" y2="270" stroke="#333" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<text x="275" y="145" font-size="12" fill="#333">x</text>
<text x="155" y="25" font-size="12" fill="#333">y</text>
<line x1="190" y1="210" x2="230" y2="210" stroke="#d32f2f" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5"/>
<circle cx="190" cy="210" r="6" fill="#1565c0"/>
<text x="200" y="200" font-size="13" fill="#1565c0">A(2,-3)</text>
<circle cx="230" cy="210" r="6" fill="#2e7d32"/>
<text x="240" y="200" font-size="13" fill="#2e7d32">B(4,-3)</text>
<text x="150" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565c0">求 A 和 B 的距離</text>
</svg>
